raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A yellow cup is on a blue tray on the right side of the table. A light blue cup is on the table near the center. A gray bowl is on the left side of the table. The yellow cup is rigid with a side handle; the light blue cup is rigid with a side handle; the gray bowl is rigid with a rim. STRATEGY - First, reach for the yellow cup on the blue tray, grasp its handle to lift it, then transport it to the light blue cup on the table, and place it inside the light blue cup. Failure modes include dropping the cup during transport or misaligning it during placement. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the yellow cup on the blue tray; Step 2 grasp its handle for secure hold; Step 3 transport it to the light blue cup; Step 4 place it inside the light blue cup.
Goal: inside(yellow_cup, light_blue_cup)
Scene: yellow_cup, light_blue_cup, blue_tray, gray_bowl, table
Step 1: reach(yellow_cup)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow cup on the blue tray
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_cup, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_cup) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(yellow_cup)
  affordance_region: the side handle of the yellow cup
  contact: holding(yellow_cup) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_cup)
Step 3: transport(yellow_cup -> light_blue_cup)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the light blue cup
  spatial: above(yellow_cup, light_blue_cup, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_cup)
  done_when: above(yellow_cup, light_blue_cup, 0.05)
Step 4: place(yellow_cup -> light_blue_cup)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the light blue cup
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_cup, light_blue_cup) [completion]; released(yellow_cup) [completion]
  pose: inside(yellow_cup, light_blue_cup) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_cup, light_blue_cup) AND released(yellow_cup)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow cup on the blue tray
the side handle of the yellow cup
an empty area inside the light blue cup
an empty area inside the light blue cup
